title: CRISPR/Cas9-Mediated Mutagenesis of the Granule-Bound Starch Synthase Gene in the Potato Variety Yukon Gold to Obtain Amylose-Free Starch in Tubers

L2: IJMS 2022 Best Graphic Abstract Award winner
CRISPR/Cas9 disruption of gbssI gene to eliminate amylose from potato tuber starch
L3: Award-winning graphical abstract showing CRISPR/Cas9-mediated mutagenesis pipeline: Agrobacterium-mediated transformation delivers CRISPR/Cas9 reagents to potato Yukon Gold cells, targeting granule-bound starch synthase (gbssI) gene to produce amylose-free starch in tubers. CC BY 4.0 license.
